news.t: Why it is risky for ETF investors to blindly chase the small-cap rally
Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.
Invesco small-cap ETFs clean up on Wednesday's short squeeze

holdings.infoBox: XSVM is an equity ETF with a total of 120 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vishay Intertechnology stock at 2.68%, StoneX Group at 2.21%, MarineMax at 1.79%, United Natural Foods at 1.63%, and The Andersons at 1.60%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Value with Momentum ETF (XSVM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a value score-weighted index of US small-cap stocks selected by a combination of value and momentum screens. XSVM was launched on Mar 3, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.
data.text: After growth's long ascendancy, value shares are getting their day in the sun. To determine which have the best prospects, check for factors including liquidity, quality, size, and momentum.

data.title: Invesco small-cap ETFs clean up on Wednesday's short squeeze
